title: Thirumba Thirumba Lyrics Sattam Oru Iruttarai Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Thirumba Thirumba
Singers: Haricharan & Andrea
Lyrics : Na.Muthkumar
Music: Vijay Antony
Movie: Sattam Oru Irutarai

Thirumba thirumba paarthu kondaal
theeyum poovum pesi kondaal
thurathi thurathi thirudi kondaal
thigatta thigatta theendi kondaal

illai endru kangal sonaal
iruku endru idhayam sonnaal
inbamaana thunban endraal

Thirumba thirumba paarthu kondaal
theeyum poovum pesi kondaal
thurathi thurathi thirudi kondaal
thigatta thigatta theendi kondaal

Madiyil saaindhu megam paarthaal
megam vandhu madiyil saaindhaal
pookal modhi vaanam udaindhaal
boomi suttri meley parandhaal

Thirumba thirumba paarthu kondaal
theeyum poovum pesi kondaal
thurathi thurathi thirudi kondaal
thigatta thigatta theendi kondaal

Paartha paarvai podhum endraal
meendum meendum vendum endraal
Vaarthai nindru mounam vandhaal
mounam kooda pesum endraal

Thirumba thirumba paarthu kondaal
theeyum poovum pesi kondaal
thurathi thurathi thirudi kondaal
thigatta thigatta theendi kondaal..

Illai endru kangal sonaal
iruku endru idhayam sonnaal
inbamaana thunban endraal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thirumba Thirumba?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, reflecting on the complexities of relationships.

What is the plot context of the movie Sattam Oru Iruttarai?

The movie explores themes of justice and morality, with the song highlighting emotional moments in the narrative.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Haricharan.

Who composed the music for Sattam Oru Iruttarai?

The music was composed by Vijay Antony, known for his unique style and catchy tunes.

When was Thirumba Thirumba released?

The song was released on November 23, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thirumba Thirumba, the emotional depth of the song mirrors the struggles of love portrayed in Sattam Oru Iruttarai. The lyrics, penned by Na Muthukumar, evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it relatable to anyone who has faced heartbreak. The harmonious blend of Andrea Jeremiah and Haricharan's voices adds a layer of beauty to the song, enhancing its romantic essence. This melody serves as a poignant reminder of the complexities of relationships, leaving listeners with a lingering sense of yearning.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thirumba Thirumba from the Sattam Oru Iruttarai soundtrack is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Andrea Jeremiah and Haricharan, paired with Vijay Antony's captivating music, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. Dive into this lyrical journey that intertwines emotions and melodies, making it a must-listen for every music lover.
stanzaMeanings: If you look back and see, the fire and flower will talk. If you steal and run away, you will be caught and chased.
Oh.. what is the name for this? Tell me the answer.
If the eyes say no, the heart will say that there is happiness in pain.
What is the name for this? Tell me the answer.
If you look back and see, the fire and flower will talk. If you steal and run away, you will be caught and chased.
In the embrace, if you see the cloud, the cloud will come and embrace you. If the flowers bloom and the sky breaks, the earth will spin and fly above.
Oh.. what is the name for this? Tell me, tell me..
If you look back and see, the fire and flower will talk. If you steal and run away, you will be caught and chased.
If seeing is enough, then again and again it is needed. If silence comes from words, even silence will speak.
Oh.. what is the name for this? Tell me, tell me.
If you look back and see, the fire and flower will talk. If you steal and run away, you will be caught and chased..
Oh.. what is the name for this? Tell me the answer.
If the eyes say no, the heart will say that there is happiness in pain.
What is the name for this? Tell me the answer.
